x-enumeration-literals.name: Customer Survey
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Targeted at customers to gather feedback on products or services.
Examples: Post-purchase surveys, net promoter score (NPS) surveys.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Employee Survey
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Targeted at employees to gauge job satisfaction, engagement, and opinions.
Examples: Employee engagement surveys, 360-degree feedback surveys.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Market Research Survey
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Conducted to understand market trends, preferences, and behaviors.
Examples: Brand awareness surveys, product concept tests

x-enumeration-literals.name: Academic Survey
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Used in research studies to gather data for academic purposes.
Examples: Surveys for theses, dissertations, or scholarly research.
